Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}You can now {f 0 1 2}Ambush{f 0 1 27} enemies while exploring. When Ambushing an enemy, you'll trigger Chance Encounters {f 0 1 2}regardless of the direction an enemy is facing{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 33}Press and hold {f 1 3 118} to dash for a set distance to enter the {f 0 1 2}assault state{f 0 1 27}. By pressing {f 1 3 111} while in this state, you will {f 0 1 2}Ambush{f 0 1 27} the enemy.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 34}Triggering an encounter from behind will slightly {f 0 1 2}increase {f 4 2}'s Theurgy gauge{f 0 1 27} and may {f 0 1 2}Distress{f 0 1 27} the enemy at the beginning of battle.[n]{f 1 1}
